name: v1alpha1ProjectRole
description: v1alpha1ProjectRole schema from Argo CD API

description.name: Description is a description of the role

groups.name: Groups are a list of OIDC group claims bound to this role

jwtTokens.name: JWTTokens are a list of generated JWT tokens bound to this role

name.name: Name is a name for this role

policies.name: Policies Stores a list of casbin formatted strings that define access policies for the role in the project
